rulings.Case Title: BARBARA WILLIAMS VS. JULIE YEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement; Memorandum Of P/A In Support; Declaration Of Dow W. Patten In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, October 1, 2009, line 1, PLAINTIFF BARBARA WILLIAMS Motion To Enforce Settlement. Plaintiff's motion to enforce settlement denied without prejudice. Defendant's motion to enforce settlement was granted March 23, 2009. Although the court's ruling has not yet been reduced to a written order, that ruling remains valid unless set aside or vacated. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: TOM BABIN VS. NIKOLAS ARNOLD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Nikolas Arnold Motion To Quash Service Of Amended Complaint Continued From Sept. 28, 20009 To October 1, 2009. Defendant Must Provide Courtesy Copies Of His Motion To Department 302 No Later Than Wednesday, September 30, At Noon.
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, October 1, 2009, line 11, Motion to quash denied. Defendant's demurrer was a general appearance. Code of Civil Procedure section 418.10(e)(3). Five days leave to respond. =(302/CWW)
